falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 rises by 5% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the 'HOLD' signal, indicating a breakout rather than consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Non-Farm Payrolls report exceeds 300k jobs added in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a strong labor market indicator would invalidate the current 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing clear bullish momentum.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would signal extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' signal and pattern match to a bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
